notes.spineStructure: Spine ordering matches exactly across all 10 books (394/394 original, all new books spine verified). Cover promotion works via promoteCoverSectionFromGuide(). Section counts match for all books.
notes.navigation: NCX hierarchy, page lists, NAV landmarks, and xmlns:mbp namespace all match between Go and Python for all 10 books. 1984 has 1 minor page anchor fragment diff (#page_134) caused by upstream position resolution, not navigation code. SecretsCrown navigation diffs are filename convention only (VAL-EPUB-002).
notes.metadata: All OPF metadata fields (manifest, cover-image property, metadata entries, spine toc, guide entries, ASIN identifier, creator refinements with marc:relators, MARC namespace) match perfectly across all 10 books. SecretsCrown content.opf diffs are filename convention only.
notes.miscHelpers: 15 Python functions in yj_to_epub_misc.py fully accounted for. 7 have full parity, 3 have partial parity (KVG/FXL edge cases), 5 missing (FXL/plugin-only). All missing/partial functions are for features not exercised by current test books. 394/394 comparison parity confirmed.
